name: virtual-avatar-media-server
description: Local media server for TTS, STT, and Live2D/VRM control

scripts.start:all: concurrently -n Node,Python -c blue,green "node src/index.js" "cd python && python server.py"
scripts.dev: concurrently -n Node,Python -c blue,green "node --watch src/index.js" "cd python && python server.py"
